deployable_servers.name: meok-governance-engine-mcp
deployable_servers.description: 62 AI governance tools. 10 frameworks. 12 crosswalks. The most comprehensive compliance MCP.

bulk_commands.clone_all: for repo in $(cat manifest.json | jq -r '.deployable_servers[].name'); do git clone https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/$repo.git; done
